summary: Snake Game 3D with coin collection, points scaling by snake size, face-to-face kill mechanic, and UI layout adjustments.
known_issues: Coin counter starts at 0 and only increments by 1 per coin collected (not tracking correctly)
Mini-map needs to be moved to top-left; joystick needs to be moved slightly upward

existing_features.title: Fix the coin collection counter in SpaceSnakeMissionBanner and useSpaceSnakeGame so that it correctly initializes at 0 and increments by the actual number of coins collected per pickup event. The counter must not go negative or overflow into large negative numbers as seen in the screenshot showing '-203223/30'.
Move the SpaceSnakeMinimap component from the right side of the screen to the top-left corner in SpaceSnakeScreen.tsx.
Move the SpaceSnakeJoystick component slightly upward in SpaceSnakeScreen.tsx so it is not sitting at the very bottom edge of the screen.
